name: Platcom, Inc.
summary: Platcom, Inc. focuses on originating, funding, and insurance for asset-based transactions in the private market. It provides asset based funding against marketable income producing and insurable assets to small and medium sized businesses. The company was formerly known as Sequoia Asset Management Group, Inc. and changed its name to Platcom, Inc. in November 2007. The company is based in St Petersburg, Florida.
